dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4171 IS: Virtual Currency Tax Fairness Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Budd introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to exclude from gross income de minimis gains or losses from certain sales or exchanges of virtual currency, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Virtual Currency Tax Fairness Act.

subsection.text: Part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by inserting after section 139L the following new section:

section.header: De minimis gain or loss from sale or exchange of virtual currency

subsection.text: Subject to subsection (b), gross income shall not include gain or loss from the sale or exchange of virtual currency, unless the sale or exchange is for—

paragraph.text: any property used by the taxpayer in the active conduct of a trade or business, or
any property held by the taxpayer for the production of income (as described in section 212(2)).
Subsection (a) shall not apply in the case of any sale or exchange for which—

subparagraph.text: the total value of such sale or exchange exceeds $200, or
the total gain or loss which would otherwise be recognized with respect to such sale or exchange exceeds $200.

paragraph.text: For purposes of this subsection, all sales or exchanges which are part of the same transaction (or a series of related transactions) shall be treated as one sale or exchange.

subsection.text: For purposes of this section, the term virtual currency means a digital representation of value which—

paragraph.text: functions as a unit of account, a store of value, or a medium of exchange, and
is not a representation of the United States dollar or any foreign currency.

subsection.text: In the case of any taxable year beginning in a calendar year after 2027, each dollar amount in subsection (b)(1) shall be increased by an amount equal to—

paragraph.text: the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for the calendar year in which the taxable year begins, determined by substituting calendar year 2026 for calendar year 2016 in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

subsection.continuation-text: Any increase determined under the preceding sentence shall be rounded to the nearest multiple of $10.

subsection.text: The table of sections for part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by inserting after the item relating to section 139L the following new item:

toc.toc-entry: Sec. 139K. De minimis gain or loss from sale or exchange of virtual currency.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply with respect to transactions entered into after December 31, 2026.
